text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Arriving at a Kansai food fair, I spot Tamamo
Cross and Super Creek touring the stalls.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Tamtam. This stall's selling the grilled squid
you were looking for.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Good eye, Creek!
Hello, ma'am! Hit me with the goods!

text_block_list.name: Food Stall Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, welcome... The Osaka-style grilled squid,
right? Ya both havin' one?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Um, you seem kinda down, ma'am.
Somethin' wrong?

text_block_list.name: Food Stall Lady
text_block_list.text:
Sucks to say, but business hasn't been great. The
folk here can't tell the difference between
Osaka-style grilled squid 'n their local stuff.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I bet you've been pourin' your heart into
makin' these... Now I'm feelin' down too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I know! I'll go 'n attract some customers for ya!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If that's the plan, I'll help. We can accomplish
more as a pair.

text_block_list.name: Food Stall Lady
text_block_list.text:
You'd really do that? Well, if you two aren't the
kindest souls I ever met!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Just wait—you'll be up to your ears in
customers before long!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! Can I interest you in some delish
grilled squid?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Grilled squid? But you can get that anywhere...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Think again! This isn't your ordinary grilled squid!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's an Osakan specialty, grilled in a batter like a
crepe! Buy now to get a bargain—one pack for a
measly five million yen!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam, is that true? Is it really a luxury cuisine?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Like hell it is! I'm doin' a bit, duh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But as a grilled squid connoisseur, I'd pay five million for this—and that's a guarantee!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam... I didn't know grilled squid got you so...
fired up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I—wait, was that a joke? That's s'posed to
be my turf!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I love the comedy act! Maybe I'll give that
squid a try!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y'mean it?! Then that stall over there's where you
wanna go!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's keep this rolling! You there, hot
stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's keep this rolling! You there, hot
stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, aren't you a trainer from Tracen? Were you
watchin' us?
choice_data_list: Yeah. You sure know how to advertise.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's 'cause business is more than just numbers—you gotta really connect to people!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But we're just chatting to them, aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but they can tell we're doin' it with heart!
We wouldn't have that if we didn't wanna help the
squid lady!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but they can tell we're doin' it with heart!
We wouldn't have that if we didn't wanna help the
squid lady!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for yer patronage! Don't hold back—eat
till you're bursting!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Having fun, Tamtam?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Course I am! Business done right makes everyone
happy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm sellin' squid 'n smiles—nothin' beats that!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Course! I bet the squid lady's grinnin' ear to ear
right now!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're such a lovely girl, Tamtam. Come
here, let me pat your head! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Da hell?! Quit it with the baby treatment!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Save the praise for later—we've still got squid to
sell, yeah?!
